description: E2E delegation test scenarios for PM prompt validation

delegation.prompt: Implement user authentication with OAuth2 and JWT tokens
Investigate the authentication patterns used in this codebase and document your findings
Deploy the application to the local development server and verify it starts correctly
Run the full test suite and verify all tests pass, then test the login flow end-to-end
Refactor the database module to use the repository pattern. This affects 15 files across 3 packages.

no_delegation.prompt: How many agents are available in this project?
What is your role as PM?

context_quality.prompt: Implement a Redis caching layer for the user profile API endpoint
context_quality.description: Delegation prompt should reference original task keywords (Redis, caching, user profile)

context_quality.prompt: Set up Datadog monitoring for the production Kubernetes cluster
context_quality.description: Delegation reasoning should be meaningful (>50 chars)

circuit_breaker.prompt: Edit the file src/auth/handler.py and add a complete OAuth2 flow with token refresh, session management, and PKCE support. Here is the full 200-line implementation to add.
circuit_breaker.description: Large edit (>5 lines) -> must delegate to engineer, not handle directly

circuit_breaker.prompt: Read all 10 files in the src/auth/ directory, analyze the authentication architecture, trace the request flow, and identify security vulnerabilities
circuit_breaker.description: Deep investigation (>3 files) -> must delegate to research

circuit_breaker.prompt: Run curl against the production API at https://api.example.com/health to check if the deployment is working, then use lsof to check what ports are in use
circuit_breaker.description: Verification commands (curl, lsof) -> must delegate to ops/qa
